title: coelopleurum trichocarpum
intro: Coelopleurum trichocarpum, also known as the Chinese angelica tree, is a type of flowering plant in the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting blood circulation. Coelopleurum trichocarpum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
